mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_id, type, reference_id, amount, status, pay_time, pay_method FROM payment
SELECT id, patient_id, type, reference_id, amount, status, pay_time, pay_method FROM payment WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND status = 'UNPAID'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (patient_id, type, reference_id, amount, status, pay_time, pay_method) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{type}, #{referenceId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{payTime}, #{payMethod})
